mano_cua.result_summary: 无法测试。nuxt-directus 是 Nuxt 模块，playground 需要 Directus CMS 后端 (localhost:8055)。裸机 macOS 上无 Docker/Directus 实例，无法启动完整测试环境。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Nuxt module requiring Directus backend on localhost:8055. No Docker/Directus available on bare macOS.
